name: NAC Kazatomprom JSC
content: Kazatomprom is the world's largest producer and seller of natural uranium, accounting for approximately 20% of total global primary uranium production. As the national atomic company of Kazakhstan, it operates a vast portfolio of low-cost in-situ recovery (ISR) mines. Kazatomprom is a dominant force in the global uranium market, providing critical supply to nuclear utilities worldwide and maintaining a strategic leadership position in the nuclear fuel cycle.
